name: Balance - Santa Rosa
description_short: Non-profit financial wellness organization offering free and low-cost coaching, housing workshops, and guidance on debt, savings, spending, retirement, and financial planning.
description_long:
Balance is a non-profit organization that has been operating since 1969, positioning itself as a national leader in financial wellness and consumer financial counseling. The organization provides personalized financial guidance to help consumers achieve financial stability and long-term security.

Balance offers a range of services centered on financial wellness coaching, including one-on-one personalized coaching sessions, housing workshops focused on homeownership preparation, and educational resources covering spending management, debt reduction, saving strategies, retirement planning, and financial protection. The organization emphasizes unfiltered and unbiased advice delivered by trained professionals who work directly with clients to develop customized financial roadmaps.

The organization distinguishes itself through its long operational history since 1969, its positioning as a non-profit entity, and its multi-faceted approach to financial wellness that extends beyond traditional credit counseling to include housing readiness, retirement planning, and comprehensive financial goal-setting. They also offer partnership opportunities for other organizations seeking to help their clients improve financial wellness.

Balance appears to be a legitimate non-profit counseling organization, likely HUD-approved or NFCC-certified based on its professional approach and range of services. The main limitation is that specific pricing, availability in all locations (though Santa Rosa is mentioned), and detailed credential information are not provided on the website. Consumers should verify their specific location service area and certifications before engaging.
pros: Established 1969 non-profit with 50+ years of track record in financial wellness
Offers personalized one-on-one financial coaching with customizable focus areas
Comprehensive housing workshops specifically designed for homeownership preparation
Covers multiple financial areas: spending, saving, debt, retirement, and planning — not just credit
Free or low-cost services as a non-profit (no predatory lending or hidden fees typical of for-profit competitors)
Provides down-payment and lender incentive guidance for aspiring homebuyers
Positions unbiased, unfiltered advice as core value proposition
cons: Website does not clearly list specific pricing, whether services are completely free or have fees
No detailed information about counselor certifications (HUD-approval, NFCC status) visible on homepage
Limited information about service area coverage and whether they serve all regions equally
No online scheduling or intake process visible; requires phone call or website contact
No online chat or immediate response option compared to modern fintech competitors
best_for: First-time homebuyers seeking structured guidance on down payments, mortgages, and homeownership readiness
Consumers facing financial crisis or debt issues who need personalized counseling and action plans
Individuals planning major life transitions (retirement, home purchase, family protection) who want professional guidance
diagnosis: Balance is best for consumers seeking comprehensive, non-profit financial guidance from an established organization, particularly those preparing for homeownership or recovering from financial crisis. The main caveat is that pricing and specific certifications are not clearly detailed on the website, so interested consumers should contact them directly to confirm services are free and verify counselor credentials and your location's service availability.
services: Housing workshops series for homeownership preparation
Savings and emergency fund building coaching
Financial protection planning (insurance and estate documents)
Organization partnership programs for client financial wellness
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
address: 3033 Cleveland Ave, Suite 101, Santa Rosa, CA 95403
